purpose: Defines the master agent's dispatch protocol: eager dispatch loop, dependency-driven worker spawning, repair task creation when workers fail, and the circuit-breaker conditions that pause replanning. Specifies the exact write contract the master uses against initialization.json and progress observations to decide what to dispatch next.
gotchas: initialization.json is write-once except for repair task additions -- regular updates go to logs.json
Repair tasks use an 'r' suffix on task IDs and are appended to the existing wave
patterns: Eager dispatch (dispatch as soon as deps are met)
Circuit breaker on cascading failure (3+ related failures in a wave)
conventions: Master never writes worker progress files
Dispatch decisions based on reads of progress/{id}.json snapshots
